name: Classic Chocolate Chunk
desc: 72% Valrhona dark chocolate folded into brown-butter dough. The one that started it all.
origin: Born in Lena's home kitchen, 2023. The recipe that started it all.

name: Double Dark Chocolate
desc: Dutch cocoa base loaded with bittersweet chunks. Dusted with Maldon salt.
origin: Created for a chocolate-obsessed regular who said 'make it darker.' We did.

name: Brown Butter Toffee
desc: Nutty brown butter meets house-made almond toffee. Sweet, salty, crunch, chew.
origin: Inspired by a trip to an English sweets shop. The crunch took 12 tries to perfect.

name: Raspberry Dark
desc: Tart freeze-dried raspberries woven through dark chocolate dough. Pink-flecked and punchy.
origin: A happy accident — Marcus dropped freeze-dried raspberries into dark chocolate dough.

name: Sea Salt Caramel
desc: Gooey caramel core wrapped in vanilla bean dough. Finished with flaky sea salt.
origin: Lena's grandmother's caramel recipe, adapted for cookies. The salt is French.

name: Matcha White Chocolate
desc: Ceremonial-grade matcha and creamy white chocolate. Earthy, sweet, and vibrant green.
origin: A collaboration with a tea master from Uji, Japan. The matcha is ceremonial grade.
